calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for a Short Cause Trial. No appearance by defendant (s).
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(S) IEESHEA ROMERO.
The court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant(s) as follows:
Principal $1,414.55
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $291.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,705.55
Judgment signed in open court.
On the record the court ordered counsel for Plaintiff to find out from his client if the filing of the Dismissal Entire Action with prejudice on file as of 5/22/2015 was filed in error. Court ordered the clerk to withold Judgment until the dismissal on file is set aside.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Set For Trial On May-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
